name: Age Gate (18+)
description: Minimal-disclosure age verification for adult content / gambling / age-restricted services. Proves age ≥ 18 without revealing the actual birthday — uses TDEN's selective-disclosure VC capability when available, falls back to dob field with truncation to year-only.
description_zh: 最小披露的年龄验证,用于成人内容 / 博彩 / 年龄限制服务。证明 ≥ 18 而不透露真实生日 — 优先用 TDEN 选择性披露 VC,降级到只取年份。

fields.justification: Required to verify age ≥ 18. Phase B will switch to selective disclosure (proof of age range) without exposing the actual date.
fields.justification_zh: 用于验证年龄 ≥ 18。Phase B 将切换为选择性披露(只证明年龄范围,不暴露具体日期)。

fields.justification: Optional: only show is_real_name_verified=true users to reduce fraudulent age claims.
fields.justification_zh: 可选:只让已实名用户通过,降低虚假年龄索赔。

purpose: Block under-18 users from accessing age-restricted content while collecting the absolute minimum personal data. Most jurisdictions require some age check for adult content; TDEN's selective-disclosure path means we never see the user's actual birthday once Phase B ZK is wired.
purpose_zh: 在收集最少个人数据的前提下阻止未满 18 岁用户访问年龄限制内容。大多数辖区都要求年龄检查;TDEN 选择性披露路径(Phase B ZK 后)意味着我们永远不会看到用户的真实生日。
author: TDEN team
